kpis.name: Defensive actions
kpis.description: Number of successful defensive actions (defensive duels, tackles, interceptions, recoveries, clearances) adjusted by the opponent's possession.

kpis.name: Touches
kpis.description: Number of open play touches when in possession (passes, shots, carries, dribbles, touches) adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: xGBuildup
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty xG for possessions in which a player is involved in at least one event, excluding shots and shot assists adjusted by possession.
